items.description: Only public-domain artworks can enter the studio
items.observableAssertion: Every selectable and exportable artwork has isPublicDomain=true and a non-empty imageId

items.description: Poster state is validated and shareable
items.observableAssertion: A copied URL restores artwork, template, ratio, scale and focus; invalid values fall back safely

items.description: Canvas export is nonblank and correctly sized
items.observableAssertion: Each ratio exports a PNG with the declared dimensions and nontransparent sampled pixels

items.description: Desktop studio keeps the complete task in one viewport
items.observableAssertion: Search, poster preview and export action are visible without overlap at 1440x900
The page has no horizontal overflow, search and poster are visible, and all controls are at least 44px

items.description: Long artwork metadata stays inside the poster safe area
items.observableAssertion: Long title and artist strings wrap or truncate without covering adjacent content

items.description: API failure has a usable fallback
items.observableAssertion: A failed search shows an actionable error while curated artwork and the current poster remain available

items.description: Share and download provide stable feedback
items.observableAssertion: Native share or copy fallback and PNG download show status without resizing the toolbar
Factory growth audit passes for metadata, robots, sitemap, manifest, structured data, social preview, share and analytics

items.description: No secrets or user data are tracked
items.observableAssertion: Git and Factory audits find no env files, keys, uploaded images or personal data
Lint, TypeScript, unit tests and static production build return zero

items.description: Release remains human gated and reversible
items.observableAssertion: Candidate records commit, rollback tag, screenshots and deployment state before public release
